name: Chicken with Turnips and Dried Cherries
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless skinned chicken breast halves (about 1.5 lbs each)
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Dredge each chicken breast in flour, shaking off excess, and brown on both sides. Remove to a side dish and season with salt and pepper.
3. Add turnips to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly golden in spots, about 5 minutes. Add onion and reduce heat to low; cook for 3 to 4 more minutes.
4. Stir in maple syrup, thyme, and chicken broth. Return chicken and bring mixture to a simmer. Simmer partially covered until chicken is cooked through but still tender, about 6 minutes.
5. Taste sauce and adjust seasoning with additional salt and pepper if needed. Transfer chicken to warm platter; spoon sauce over top and sprinkle with parsley. Serve hot.
